# Pyth456

> <!-- DESCRIPTION:START -->
> A Python agent is an autonomous program that uses an LLM (like Claude) as its "brain" to reason, make decisions, and take actions — such as calling tools, browsing the web, reading files, or executing code — in order to complete a goal with minimal human intervention.
> <!-- DESCRIPTION:END -->

## 📝 Description
<!-- DESCRIPTION_SECTION:START -->
A Python agent is an autonomous program that uses an LLM (like Claude) as its "brain" to reason, make decisions, and take actions — such as calling tools, browsing the web, reading files, or executing code — in order to complete a goal with minimal human intervention.
<!-- END: Description -->
